title: Cursed fate: Ancient volumes and scrolls
description: This mod is an addon to the Cursed fate mod. The addon adds a book to choose your technique, and scrolls that level up your technique, weapons, fists, and cursed energy
body:
This mod is an addon to the mod on jujutsu kaisen - Cursed fate and adds to the game the selection of techniques and scrolls for pumping their abilities
# **The technique selection book**

The technique selection book is given to the player when the first time in the world. it allows the player to choose his cursed technique from the mod Cursed fate. 

Opening the menu and clicking on any technique you will see a description to it, where it will be briefly written about what the technique is and what abilities it has.

Addon also supports addons:

https://modrinth.com/mod/cursed-fate-projection-sorcery - Projection Technique

https://modrinth.com/mod/cf-ratio-technique - Ratio Technique

https://modrinth.com/mod/kashimo-(mythical-beast-amber)-cursed-fate-addon - Amber Beast Technique

https://modrinth.com/mod/cursed-speech-cursed-fate-addon. - Cursed speech Technique

https://modrinth.com/mod/frostyys-deadly-sentencing-addon - Deadly sentencing Technique

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ice-formation-cursed-fate-addon/files/all?page=1&pageSize=20&showAlphaFiles=hide - Ice formation Technique

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/disaster-plants-cursed-fate-addon/files/7756034 - Disaster plants Technique

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-addons/cursed-fate-modulo-yuji-addon - Yuji Itadori module Technique

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/malice-and-light-cursed-fate-addon-dabura - Light Technique

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/harmony-and-chaos-cursed-fate-addon-marulu-val-vol - Harmony and chaos Technique

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cursed-fate-technique-extinguishment - Extinguishment Technique

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cursed-fate-antigravity-system - Antigravity Technique

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cursed-fate-black-bird-manipulation - Raven control Technique

# **Scrolls**
In total, the addon adds 4 types of scrolls for each section of abilities from the cursed fate mod. Each type of scroll has 3 levels:

3 Level - increases ability by 2 levels

2 Level - increases ability by 5 levels

1 Level - increases ability by 10 levels

Scroll of Reverse Cursed Technique, allowing you to obtain Reverse Cursed Technique

# **Creatures**

Shoko Ieri can spawn randomly in the world

You can trade with her, getting a scroll of the reverse cursed technique

# **Shards**

Shard reroll technique - Allows you to change your innate technique to a random one from the "cursed fate" mod and from the add-ons that you have installed and that are supported by this mod

# **Other mechanics**

By picking up the Cursed Amethyst Bottle and pressing the right mouse button, you can regain your cursed energy

Whether you will receive a book of technique selection, whether you can get back the damned energy from the bottle, and how much damned energy you will receive from it are all configurable in the game rules
